engine.ladder_reasoning: Closest fit: browsing a catalog of products (photos, prices, discounts) IS the decision, akin to browsing a shop; but it is truly an e-commerce storefront with cart/checkout, not a single-conversion landing page.

goal.one_action: Browse the TOTO product catalog and buy sanitary ware (add to cart / checkout), or call/Zalo for a quote

structure.archetype_note: E-commerce catalog CMS with category pages, product grids, cart/checkout, newsletter, and multi-showroom contact page.

mapped.observed_as: THIẾT BỊ VỆ SINH TOTO CHÍNH HÃNG, GIÁ RẺ NHẤT 2025
Sản phẩm TOTO bán chạy nhất (best-selling products grid w/ prices & discounts)
Tin tức thiết bị vệ sinh toto (news/blog feed)
SHOWROOM ... HÀ NỘI (3 showroom addresses + hours)

unmapped.observed: Product category listing pages with filters (Bồn cầu TOTO etc.)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Canonical section list has no 'product catalog / category grid' section — sectionList is landing-page oriented, not a shoppable catalog

proposed_new.name: storefront-checkout
proposed_new.evidence: commerce.cart_or_checkout=true; product grids show prices with -18% to -31% discounts (5.896.000 ₫ from 7.157.000 ₫); on-site cart + checkout selling one-time goods

design_style.none_fits_because: Discount-driven, photo-heavy retail promo layout emphasizing prices/savings; closest to bold/performance among the six.

confidence.why: fetch_quality=full; commerce flags and section structure clearly indicate an e-commerce storefront, not a single-action landing page.

gap_findings: Site is an e-commerce catalog with cart/checkout — not one conversion action; outside ICP (in_icp:false).
No canonical section expresses a shoppable product category/listing grid with filters.
storefront-checkout capability reused from registry — closed capability vocab has 'catalog' (browse only) but no cart/checkout notion.
